description_long: This is a small, modern light airplane with a sleek, streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The aircraft features a single propeller mounted at the nose and a distinctive twin-boom tail with a horizontal stabilizer connecting the two vertical fins. The exterior is primarily white with blue accent stripes on the wings and tail, and the registration marking is visible on the tail. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy, and the landing gear is tricycle-style with two main wheels and a nose wheel. The wings are straight with slight dihedral angles and no visible winglets, and the propeller blades are painted with blue tips.
description: A sleek, white low-wing light airplane with blue accents, twin-boom tail, and a single nose-mounted propeller. Features an enclosed cockpit and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Side-rear view showing the twin-boom tail, blue stripes on the tail and wings, and the single propeller at the nose.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the twin vertical stabilizers, horizontal stabilizer, and the tricycle landing gear.
description_view_2: Side-rear view from the opposite side, showing the cockpit canopy, propeller, and the main landing gear.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the nose-mounted propeller, cockpit canopy, and the full wingspan with blue-tipped propeller blades.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral angle and no winglets.
attribute_tail_design: Twin-boom tail with dual vertical stabilizers connected by a horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a clear canopy, likely single or dual seat.
